name: mankahi
description: Root-level orchestration scripts for the ManKahi monorepo. Each backend service and the frontend remain independent npm projects (no workspaces) - these scripts just shell out to each one in turn, matching how they're built independently in Docker.

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend/shared && npm install --prefix backend/auth-service && npm install --prefix backend/blog-service && npm install --prefix backend/analytics-service && npm install --prefix backend/admin-service && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.test: npm run test:auth && npm run test:blog && npm run test:analytics && npm run test:admin
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:auth && npm run typecheck:blog && npm run typecheck:analytics && npm run typecheck:admin && npm run typecheck:frontend
